title: Let Me Sit
description: Datapack that lets you sit using double shift
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d4fe42d40e8d7453d41b2acb766d70faa7f1bf7.png)

Found bug / order datapack / other - [Discord](https://discord.gg/dCWyMsE94D).

In short, you will sit down if you look down and press shift twice!
